title: Project Management Assistant (m/f/d)
required_skills: German fluency — written and oral (hard requirement)
2-3 years experience in a project environment
Industrial Clerk / Administrative Assistant or equivalent education
matched_skills: Microsoft Office (MS Excel, MS PowerPoint confirmed in CV)
Project environment experience — HSBC PMO 2021-2022 and Hapag-Lloyd 2024-2025 (exceeds 2-3 year requirement)
Budget tracking and cost monitoring (USD 8M programme at HSBC)
missing_skills: SAP — not mentioned in CV; JD explicitly requires SAP-based cost control, purchase requisitions, and goods receipt tracking
German fluency — CV shows B1 only; JD requires full written and oral fluency (estimated C1+)
Procurement coordination and purchase requisition handling — no supply chain or ERP procurement experience evident
Formal Industrial Clerk / Administrative Assistant education — CV holds a different educational background
CAPEX project exposure — engineering investment project context not evidenced
Risk register maintenance — formal risk register tooling or process ownership not explicitly evidenced
core_responsibilities: Support risk identification, tracking, and maintenance of project risk registers and mitigation strategies
Prepare purchase requisitions, coordinate with procurement, and track deliveries and goods receipt documentation
Monitor project costs using SAP, compare actuals vs. budgets, and support financial forecasting
Facilitate meetings and communication between departments and stakeholders across six Central Europe sites
Manage project documentation and component data flow across all project phases
recommended_emphasis: Address German language level directly in the cover letter — B1 is below the fluency requirement; frame as actively improving and emphasise strong written English as a compensating strength in this international team
Highlight SAP exposure if any exists, even tangentially; otherwise foreground HSBC budget dashboards and Power BI financial reporting as evidence of ERP-adjacent cost control capability
Elevate HSBC PMO cost tracking and budget variance reporting — directly maps to the SAP-based project cost monitoring responsibility
Showcase Hapag-Lloyd meeting facilitation, action item tracking, and documentation governance as direct evidence for the communication and documentation responsibilities
Stress cross-site and multi-stakeholder coordination — JD covers six sites across Germany, France, Czech Republic, and Denmark
Lead with PMO and project coordination framing throughout; de-emphasise marketing and BD experience
Emphasise organisational rigour, deadline orientation, and structured working style — the JD lists these as must-have personal attributes

score_notes.rationale: Strong PMO and project coordination background maps well to core responsibilities (budget tracking, meeting facilitation, documentation, risk escalation). Two hard gaps materially reduce the score: (1) SAP is explicitly required in multiple responsibilities and is entirely absent from the CV; (2) German fluency is a stated requirement and the candidate is at B1. Education credential mismatch (Industrial Clerk vs. candidate background) and absence of CAPEX/procurement experience are softer additional gaps.
